text: Some rooms stay dark even when the lights are on.
The song isn't finished. It's just where you stopped.
I thought if I survived it, I'd feel different than this.
You get so used to the quiet that company starts to feel like weather.
The porch light was still on.
It's not loneliness if you're used to it. It's just how the air tastes.
Just a tired man. Still capable of love.
